title: SEA Fertility Genomics Research Report
subtitle: PGT-P Partnership Opportunities in Southeast Asia
author: Kuan Yu
summary: Mapping IVF clinics across Southeast Asia for PGT-P partnership with Genomic Prediction / LifeView.

clinics.clinic_name: Tam Anh General Hospital IVF Centre (IVFTA)
clinics.notes: Leading SE Asia IVF center. 108 Hoang Nhu Tiep Long Bien.
RTAC certified Dec 2022. First private MOH-licensed IVF in North VN. Est. 2009.
55 Yen Ninh Ba Dinh. Two campuses.
RTAC certified. Co-located with Vinmec Gene Technology Center.
MOH flagship ART center. 43 Trang Thi Hoan Kiem.
110k+ couples treated. Led by Dr Tang Duc Cuong. 5 Xa Dan Dong Da.
Advanced embryology lab. 121 O Dong Lam Dong Da.
First PGT in Vietnam 2014. 80%+ success rate.
Genea joint venture. Status of Hanoi office unconfirmed 2026.
Public hospital. IVF dept est. 2006. 72% pregnancy rate.

clinics.clinic_name: Hanoi Medical University Hospital IVF Center
clinics.notes: 40%+ success rate. 1 Ton That Tung Dong Da.

clinics.clinic_name: Bach Mai Hospital IVF Support Unit
clinics.notes: MOH authorized IVF Dec 2013. Public hospital.
International Belgian collaboration.
Est. Jan 2020. Director: Prof Nguyen Viet Tien (IVF pioneer).
49 Tran Dien Hoang Mai.

clinics.clinic_name: Hoe Nhai General Hospital IVF Unit
clinics.notes: Smaller public hospital unit.
RTAC certified. Vietnam IVF pioneer. 16300+ IVF babies. Public hospital.
Research-active. Published peer-reviewed PGT-M research. 66.7% fresh success rate.
RTAC (first in VN 2014). JCI Gold Seal 2019. Binh Duong near HCMC.
RTAC certified. ISO 15189 lab. 78.7% success rate (2024).
JCI-accredited Vinmec network.
IVFAS unit est. 2009. 65% success rate.
Est. 2000. MOH licensed for IVF Feb 2008.
District 1. Explicitly advertises PGT.
Satellite branch opened Sep 2024. Same IVFMD network.

clinics.clinic_name: Superior A.R.T. Ho Chi Minh City
clinics.notes: Genea joint venture. International biopsy shipping established.
JCI-accredited. IVF Center launched March 2025. ISO 6 lab.
Major public maternity hospital. 50% ET / 60% FET success.
Part of Phuong Chau Healthcare Group. 70%+ success (ICSI-FET <35).
110 beds. 200+ IVF babies by 2013.
Claims 80% success rates.
Advanced lab (PIEZO ICSI / AI Time-Lapse). ISO 6 lab.

clinics.ships_overseas: Yes - ships biopsies to external labs
clinics.notes: Fertility Service Provider of Year Asia-Pacific. In-house genetics. WhatsApp: +60 14-941 6388.
4 centres nationwide. WhatsApp: +60 18-230 1717.
Est. 1994. RTAC-certified. Longest-running private fertility in MY. Formerly Tropicana Medical Centre.
Inside KPJ Damansara Specialist Hospital. 50-60% pregnancy rate.
Part of Sunway Medical Centre. Separate from Sunfert.
Dr Agilan Arjunan FRCOG. Two PJ locations. WhatsApp: +6012 694 4868.
Dedicated women's & children's hospital. Shah Alam.
12 hospitals in Malaysia. Multiple KL-area locations.
40+ years. 20000+ babies. Affiliated with Monash IVF Group.
Est. 1989. First IVF baby 2000. 14+ branches nationwide.
Part of Alpha IVF Group. Muslim-friendly.
Women-centric & Muslim-friendly. Also has Bangi branch.
Shah Alam. Associated with GenPrime.
IHH Healthcare. IVF package from RM13888. Contact form only.
PETRONAS-linked. Premium facility.
IHH Healthcare group.
Solo practitioner. Mont Kiara.
Public university hospital. Lower cost but longer waits.
CAP + ISO17025 + ISO15189 accredited. Key potential PGT-P partner.
Est. 1994. RTAC standards. IVF from MYR 19500. WhatsApp: +6011 5851 4649.
JB branch since 2004. Part of Thomson Hospital chain.

Hospital-based. Iskandar Puteri. Opened Dec 2019.

Gleneagles Hospital Johor. Refers advanced cases out.
Public. PGT-A pilot trial site.
Public. PGT-A pilot trial site.
Public. Houses NUH PGDC - only MOH-approved PGT-M/SR testing lab in SG.
Private. Dr Tan Heng Hao.
Private. Dr Janice Tung. MOH approved PGT-M/PGT-SR centre.

Parkway Pantai group. Est. 1988.

clinics.clinic_name: Daniel Koh Clinic For Women and Fertility
clinics.notes: Dr Daniel Koh. MOH-accredited for ART.
Multiple locations. Largest IVF provider in Indonesia.

pgt_m.label: Approved
pgt_m.notes: Available at major centres — published PGT-M research for beta-thalassaemia

pgt_a.label: Approved
pgt_a.notes: Routinely offered at leading clinics in Hanoi and HCMC

pgt_sr.label: Restricted
pgt_sr.notes: Likely available at advanced centres — no explicit regulation found

pgt_p.label: Not approved
pgt_p.notes: No evidence of offering or regulation

sex_selection.label: Prohibited
sex_selection.notes: Fines up to VND 30 million (proposed increase to VND 100M)

cross_border_shipping.summary: Decree 89/2018 requires medical declaration for cross-border biological samples. No specific embryo biopsy regulation found.
cross_border_shipping.evidence: No Vietnamese clinic found publicly advertising overseas biopsy shipping.

regulatory.key_insight: Most advanced Hanoi clinics offer PGT-A — adding PGT-P is one supplier change, not a capability build.
regulatory.recent_changes: Decree 207/2025 (Oct 2025): single women can access ART; part of pro-natalist shift after ending two-child policy.

sources.title: PGT-M for beta-thalassaemia in Vietnam — PubMed
Vietnam Law Magazine — single women IVF access

pgt_m.label: Approved
pgt_m.notes: Available at Alpha IVF, Sunfert, TMC — when clinically indicated

pgt_a.label: Approved
pgt_a.notes: Broadly offered at major clinics — when clinically indicated

pgt_p.label: Unclear
pgt_p.notes: No clinics offer it; academic concerns raised under Islamic bioethics

sex_selection.label: Prohibited
sex_selection.notes: Only for sex-linked genetic disorders, case-by-case

cross_border_shipping.summary: Clinics already ship to Igenomix (~$300/shipment, 7 working days). No outright prohibition found.
cross_border_shipping.evidence: Strongest pathway — existing shipping infrastructure to overseas reference labs.

regulatory.key_insight: Clinics already ship biopsies to Igenomix — adding Genomic Prediction is operationally straightforward.
regulatory.recent_changes: Updated MMC Guideline (2025). No new ART-specific legislation. Long-discussed ART Act remains unlegislated.

sources.title: MMC Guideline on Medically Assisted Reproduction (PDF)
Islamic viewpoints on sex selection — PMC

pgt_m.label: Approved
pgt_m.notes: Mainstream since May 2021 — MOH-approved centres, specified conditions list

pgt_a.label: Pilot only
pgt_a.notes: Government pilot at public hospitals — 590 enrolled, results "inconclusive"

pgt_p.label: Not approved
pgt_p.notes: Active academic discussion (Chew et al. 2024) but no regulatory pathway

sex_selection.label: Prohibited
sex_selection.notes: Clarified in Circular 95/2023 — only for sex-linked disorders

cross_border_shipping.summary: HBRA 2015 governs tissue broadly. No specific embryo biopsy export regulation found. May be restricted by AR licensing conditions.
cross_border_shipping.evidence: Open question: can a SG clinic ship biopsies for testing not approved domestically?

regulatory.key_insight: Most regulated market — Tier 1 clinics have PGT-M/SR approval and may ship biopsies under existing frameworks.
regulatory.recent_changes: HCSA Phase 2 (Jun 2023). PGT-A pilot ongoing. Age cap removed. Circular 10/2025 updated PGT licensing.

sources.title: Chew et al. 2024 — PGT-P regulatory safeguards

pgt_a.label: Approved
pgt_a.notes: Widely offered — major fertility tourism hub

cross_border_shipping.summary: Clinics widely ship to reference labs for PGT-A. Strong existing infrastructure.
cross_border_shipping.evidence: Multiple clinics (Jetanin, Superior A.R.T., SAFE) have established overseas lab relationships.

regulatory.key_insight: Major fertility tourism hub with established biopsy shipping — natural PGT-P expansion market.

pgt_m.label: Limited
pgt_m.notes: Morula IVF offers some genetic testing

cross_border_shipping.summary: No data on cross-border biopsy shipping practices.

regulatory.key_insight: Growing IVF sector — Morula IVF dominant. Less mature than regional peers.

cross_border_shipping.summary: Only RIPAS Hospital offers limited IVF.

regulatory.key_insight: Single hospital with limited IVF — patients typically travel to Malaysia or Singapore.

methodology.geographic_scope: ~1,000km radius from Singapore + major IVF hubs (Hanoi, Bangkok)
source_types: Reference lab partner lists (Igenomix, CooperGenomics, Natera)

tiering.1: Already does PGT-A/PGT-M, ships biopsies — ready for PGT-P partnership
tiering.2: Full IVF with embryology lab but no PGT — needs onboarding

methodology.data_completeness_note: Singapore and Vietnam (Hanoi) have comprehensive data. Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, and Vietnam (HCMC) are in discovery phase.
